steps.title: Use the threshold
steps.content: The researchers concluded that bumblebees and European peacock butterflies can attract pollen because positive charges above 200 pC can draw pollen to a pollinator. Supporting data must show that both pollinators exceed that threshold.

steps.title: Require both pollinators
steps.content: Choice B compares bumblebees with houseflies but does not establish the butterfly threshold. Choice C says butterflies have the greater charge but does not show both species exceed 200 pC. Choice D only says houseflies are below the threshold. The remaining choice gives the needed above-200 pC data for both species. The answer is A.
